channel.title: Thanawat's personal blog
channel.description: I'll be posting about the things I'm interested in using this blog post

item.title: Getting one year older..
item.description: Apparently, at least in my culture, you celebrate and not mourn having one year less to live..
item.dc:creator: Thanawat Techaumnuaiwit

item.title: Video: What is Free Software?
item.description: What does it mean for software to be "free"? Why should you care that it's "Free"?
item.dc:creator: Thanawat Techaumnuaiwit

item.title: Video: Why I'm quitting Social Media
item.description: Explaining why I'm quitting social media
item.dc:creator: Thanawat Techaumnuaiwit

item.title: Video: Emacs fundamentals
item.description: Teach a person how to fish, you feed them for life!
item.dc:creator: Thanawat Techaumnuaiwit

item.title: Video: Emacs installation guide
item.description: In this post, I'll be showing you how Emacs can change your life, even if you're not a programmer
item.dc:creator: Thanawat Techaumnuaiwit

item.title: Video: Emacs For Everyone!
item.description: The start of a series to help people learn Emacs!
item.dc:creator: Thanawat Techaumnuaiwit

item.title: My First Post
item.description: A blog post explaining what content you should be expecting out of this blog
item.dc:creator: Thanawat Techaumnuaiwit
